name: Full Security Review
description: Comprehensive security audit and hardening workflow for the RealAI codebase.

steps.task: Survey the attack surface: list all authenticated and unauthenticated endpoints, identify data flows that touch external AI providers, and note any cross-origin concerns.

Audit the full codebase for: API key exposure, path traversal in the SPA catch-all, CORS misconfiguration, prompt injection vectors in agent pipelines, code execution sandboxing, and dependency vulnerabilities. Produce a prioritised finding list.
Apply remediations for API-layer findings: tighten input validation, fix any authentication gaps, and harden CORS configuration.

Apply remediations for core-capability findings: sanitise inputs to execute_code, web_research, and any external-call methods. Ensure all external calls use the configured provider key, not a hard-coded default.
Write regression tests for each security finding to prevent reintroduction. Run python test_realai.py to confirm all tests pass.
Update SECURITY_SUMMARY.txt and CONTRIBUTING.md to reflect the mitigations applied and any new security policies.
